ValidationRule.description: S&D Parameter slot 3: the Parameter, its Target and its Weightage must be entered together (all three) or left all blank.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( NOT(ISBLANK(S_D_Parameter_3__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(S_D_Parameter_3_Target__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(S_D_Parameter_3_Weightage__c)) ), OR( ISBLANK(S_D_Parameter_3__c), ISBLANK(S_D_Parameter_3_Target__c), ISBLANK(S_D_Parameter_3_Weightage__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: S & D Parameter 3: enter the Parameter, its Target and its Weightage together, or leave all three blank.
